paper_metadata.title: The Role of Emotion in Global Warming Policy Support and Opposition
paper_metadata.empirical_scope_or_sample: Nationally representative U.S. adult survey (n=1,001; regressions n=837)
paper_metadata.carbon_tax_relevance_summary: Includes one direct fuel-tax item (a 25-cent-per-gallon gasoline tax increase) within a broader climate-policy support battery, but the reported determinant models are for an overall policy-support index rather than a gasoline-tax-specific outcome.

exclusions_or_uncertainties.reason: The paper reports predictors of a composite climate-policy support index that includes gasoline tax, not separate regression results for the gasoline-tax item.
